# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: Enhanced Problem-Solving Help in the IDE
- Summary: Highlighting the new Azure OpenAI-powered assistant integration that guides users through problems with multiple model support and real-time guidance inside the editor.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-19-codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now ships an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant that assists with problem solving inside the real-time code editor. Users can switch models, get contextual hints, and see step-by-step guidance while coding, all within the familiar three-panel workspace (Problem, Editor, AI Chat). This improves learning flow without leaving the coding context.
- CTA: Open CodeGrind, start a new problem, and try the AI assistant to get guided hints without leaving the editor.
- Visual brief: Short demo video (15–20s): show a user typing a LeetCode-style prompt, AI assistant panel suggesting a plan, then code snippets appearing in the editor with inline explanations. End with a quick model-switch tip and a CTA card.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
